name: claude-basecamp
description: Zero-config localhost dashboard for Claude Code — sessions, agents, usage, tasks, and connector management across Desktop, Terminal, and API.
author: Grayson Heim

scripts.test: node --test test/sessions.test.js test/agents-connectors.test.js test/server.test.js test/store-scheduler.test.js test/git.test.js test/runner.test.js test/paths.test.js test/catalog.test.js test/rescue.test.js test/reconcile.test.js test/immune.test.js
